PRODUCT: 10ML SIZE BOTTLES
Handle: 10ml-bottles
Price: from $13.95
Category: Nail Colour

Our best selling shades in a larger format.

Description: Mavala's toxic free, cruelty free, worry free nail polishes allow nails to breathe naturally, allowing you to wear nail polish all the time, without the fear of damaging your nails.

Key Ingredients: Nitrocellulose, a natural resin extracted from wood, which forms the base of the nail polish. Plasticizers to optimise the shine, hold and drying time of the nail polish. Pigments and solvents. 13-Free. No Formaldehyde, Toluene, Phthalate (DBP), Formaldehyde Resin Tosylamide, Camphor, Xylene, Paraben, Rosin, Nickel, Triphenyl Phosphate, Acetone, Heptane or Ethyl Tosylamide.

How to Use: Apply two thin coats to the nail after using a base and before a top coat. View our Colour Application Tutorial at MAVACADEMY. Find a harmonious lipstick match with COLOR MATCH.

[Related Products: 10ml-bottles]

PRODUCT: ANTI-SPOT CREAM FOR HANDS
Handle: anti-spot-cream-for-hands
Price: $39.95
Category: Hand care

For smooth, young looking hands.

Description: Pigmentary blemishes represent one of the major natural phenomena of skin ageing. Hormonal changes, too frequent exposure to the sun or exposure without protection are the source of increased disturbance of the skin’s natural pigmentation. So, with the passing of time, pigmentary blemishes, more commonly called brown spots, appear on the skin.

Key Ingredients: 🌱 Formulated with 83% of natural origin ingredients. A complex of 7 certified organic Swiss Alpine plants (Mallow flower, mint, alchemilla, primrose, veronica, melissa and achillea) helps regulate the natural pigmentation and unify the skin. Combined with an ultra-performing derivative of highly concentrated Vitamin C, it provides antioxidant and protecting benefits. Free from mineral oil, phthalates, sodium laureth sulfate, paraben and fragrance.
